field.title: Гео флаг
field.formula:
CASE [geo]
    WHEN 'Бали' THEN '​​​🇮🇩 Бали'
    WHEN 'Таиланд' THEN '​​​​🇹🇭 Таиланд'
    WHEN 'ОАЭ' THEN '🇦🇪 ОАЭ'
    WHEN 'Москва' THEN '​​🇷🇺 Москва'
    WHEN 'СПб' THEN '​​​​​​​​​🏛️ СПб'
    WHEN 'Грузия' THEN '​​​​​🇬🇪 Грузия'
    WHEN 'Сочи' THEN '​​​​​​🏖 Сочи'
    WHEN 'Кипр' THEN '​​​​​​​​🇨🇾 Кипр'
    WHEN 'Турция' THEN '​​​​​​​🇹🇷 Турция'
    ELSE [geo]
END
field.guid_formula:
CASE [geo_d9ua]
    WHEN 'Бали' THEN '​​​🇮🇩 Бали'
    WHEN 'Таиланд' THEN '​​​​🇹🇭 Таиланд'
    WHEN 'ОАЭ' THEN '🇦🇪 ОАЭ'
    WHEN 'Москва' THEN '​​🇷🇺 Москва'
    WHEN 'СПб' THEN '​​​​​​​​​🏛️ СПб'
    WHEN 'Грузия' THEN '​​​​​🇬🇪 Грузия'
    WHEN 'Сочи' THEN '​​​​​​🏖 Сочи'
    WHEN 'Кипр' THEN '​​​​​​​​🇨🇾 Кипр'
    WHEN 'Турция' THEN '​​​​​​​🇹🇷 Турция'
    ELSE [geo_d9ua]
END

field.title: Источник
field.formula:
CASE [utmsource]
    WHEN 'Мусор' THEN '🗑 Мусор'
    WHEN 'Дубль' THEN '🗑 Дубль'
ELSE [utmsource]
END
field.guid_formula:
CASE [utmsource_puop]
    WHEN 'Мусор' THEN '🗑 Мусор'
    WHEN 'Дубль' THEN '🗑 Дубль'
ELSE [utmsource_puop]
END

field.title: title-9b82e7a0-1c68-11f1-a14b-53a6fb22167d
field.formula:
IF SUM(MAX([cost_usd] FIXED [report_date], [utmsource], [geo])) > 0 THEN
    SUM(MAX([cost_usd] FIXED [report_date], [utmsource], [geo]))
END
field.guid_formula:
IF SUM(MAX([cost_usd_s9nq] FIXED [report_date_ztop], [utmsource_puop], [geo_d9ua])) > 0 THEN
    SUM(MAX([cost_usd_s9nq] FIXED [report_date_ztop], [utmsource_puop], [geo_d9ua]))
END

field.title: CRQL
field.formula:
IF sum([leads]) > 0 AND SUM([qual]) > 0  THEN
    SUM([qual]) / SUM([leads])
ELSE
    NULL
END
field.guid_formula:
IF sum([leads_3my3]) > 0 AND SUM([qual_kdgo]) > 0  THEN
    SUM([qual_kdgo]) / SUM([leads_3my3])
ELSE
    NULL
END

field.title: AB
field.formula:
IF SUM([qual_priority_a]) + SUM([qual_priority_b]) > 0 THEN
    SUM([qual_priority_a]) + SUM([qual_priority_b])
END
field.guid_formula:
IF SUM([qual_priority_a_kxxq]) + SUM([qual_priority_b_4fbx]) > 0 THEN
    SUM([qual_priority_a_kxxq]) + SUM([qual_priority_b_4fbx])
END

field.title: %AB
field.formula:
IF SUM([qual_priority_a]) + SUM([qual_priority_b]) > 0 AND SUM([qual]) > 0 THEN
    (SUM([qual_priority_a]) + SUM([qual_priority_b])) / SUM([qual])
ELSE
    NULL
END
field.guid_formula:
IF SUM([qual_priority_a_kxxq]) + SUM([qual_priority_b_4fbx]) > 0 AND SUM([qual_kdgo]) > 0 THEN
    (SUM([qual_priority_a_kxxq]) + SUM([qual_priority_b_4fbx])) / SUM([qual_kdgo])
ELSE
    NULL
END

field.title: CR Встречи
field.formula:
IF sum([qual]) > 0 AND SUM([meet]) > 0  THEN
    SUM([meet]) / SUM([qual])
ELSE
    NULL
END
field.guid_formula:
IF sum([qual_kdgo]) > 0 AND SUM([meet_ltex]) > 0  THEN
    SUM([meet_ltex]) / SUM([qual_kdgo])
ELSE
    NULL
END

field.title: CR Наработка
field.formula:
IF sum([meet]) > 0 AND SUM([confirm]) > 0  THEN
    SUM([confirm]) / SUM([meet])
ELSE
    NULL
END
field.guid_formula:
IF sum([meet_ltex]) > 0 AND SUM([confirm_3bb5]) > 0  THEN
    SUM([confirm_3bb5]) / SUM([meet_ltex])
ELSE
    NULL
END

field.title: CR Бронь
field.formula:
IF sum([confirm]) > 0 AND SUM([kyc]) > 0  THEN
    SUM([kyc]) / SUM([confirm])
ELSE
    NULL
END
field.guid_formula:
IF sum([confirm_3bb5]) > 0 AND SUM([kyc_dnsk]) > 0  THEN
    SUM([kyc_dnsk]) / SUM([confirm_3bb5])
ELSE
    NULL
END

field.title: ROI
field.formula: IF (SUM(MAX([cost_usd] FIXED [report_date], [utmsource], [geo])) > 0, (IFNULL(SUM([profit] BEFORE FILTER BY [deal_type]), 0) - SUM(MAX([cost_usd] FIXED [report_date], [utmsource], [geo]))) / SUM(MAX([cost_usd] FIXED [report_date], [utmsource], [geo])), NULL)
field.guid_formula: IF (SUM(MAX([cost_usd_s9nq] FIXED [report_date_ztop], [utmsource_puop], [geo_d9ua])) > 0, (IFNULL(SUM([profit_9ml1] BEFORE FILTER BY [deal_type_df1j]), 0) - SUM(MAX([cost_usd_s9nq] FIXED [report_date_ztop], [utmsource_puop], [geo_d9ua]))) / SUM(MAX([cost_usd_s9nq] FIXED [report_date_ztop], [utmsource_puop], [geo_d9ua])), NULL)

field.title: CPMeet
field.formula:
IF SUM([meet]) > 0 AND SUM(MAX([cost_usd] FIXED [report_date], [utmsource], [geo])) > 0 THEN
    SUM(MAX([cost_usd] FIXED [report_date], [utmsource], [geo])) / SUM([meet])
ELSE
    NULL
END
field.guid_formula:
IF SUM([meet_ltex]) > 0 AND SUM(MAX([cost_usd_s9nq] FIXED [report_date_ztop], [utmsource_puop], [geo_d9ua])) > 0 THEN
    SUM(MAX([cost_usd_s9nq] FIXED [report_date_ztop], [utmsource_puop], [geo_d9ua])) / SUM([meet_ltex])
ELSE
    NULL
END

field.title: periods
field.formula:
IF [period] = 'День' THEN
    [report_date]
ELSEIF [period] = 'Неделя' THEN
    [report_week_start]
ELSEIF [period] = 'Месяц' THEN
    [report_month]
ELSEIF [period] = 'Год' THEN
    DATETRUNC([report_date], 'year')
ELSEIF [period] = 'Все' THEN
    NULL
END
field.guid_formula:
IF [period] = 'День' THEN
    [report_date_ztop]
ELSEIF [period] = 'Неделя' THEN
    [report_week_start_8lv8]
ELSEIF [period] = 'Месяц' THEN
    [report_month_89t4]
ELSEIF [period] = 'Год' THEN
    DATETRUNC([report_date_ztop], 'year')
ELSEIF [period] = 'Все' THEN
    NULL
END
